createvoidway.void_chest.insufficient_st: Void chests require sufficient stress on the bottom shaft to operate
createvoidway.void_chest.insufficient_tr: Void chests require void transfer fluid from the left or right side to operate
createvoidway.void_chest.no_transfer_flu: Insufficient void transfer fluid to operate
createvoidway.void_chest_input.role: Input: stores items into the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_chest_output.role: Output: extracts items from the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_chest.not_linked: No paired void chest on this frequency
createvoidway.void_chest.needs_rotation: Connect a rotating shaft to enable transfer
createvoidway.void_chest.no_shaft: No shaft connected on the bottom face
createvoidway.void_chest.no_stress_sourc: Shaft is not receiving sufficient stress
createvoidway.void_battery.no_transfer_f: Insufficient void transfer fluid to operate
createvoidway.void_battery_input.role: Input: stores energy into the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_battery_output.role: Output: extracts energy from the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_battery.not_linked: No paired void battery on this frequency
createvoidway.void_battery.needs_rotatio: Connect a rotating shaft to enable transfer
createvoidway.void_battery.no_shaft: No shaft connected on the bottom face
createvoidway.void_battery.no_stress_sou: Shaft is not receiving sufficient stress
createvoidway.void_motor_input.role: Input: injects stress into the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_motor_input.not_linke: No paired output on this frequency
createvoidway.void_motor_input.no_transf: Insufficient void transfer fluid to inject stress
createvoidway.void_motor_input.injecting: Injecting stress into the voidway channel
createvoidway.void_motor_input.needs_rot: Connect a rotating shaft to inject stress
createvoidway.void_motor_input.no_stress: Shaft is not receiving sufficient stress
createvoidway.void_motor_output.waiting_: Waiting for channel stress from inputs
createvoidway.void_motor.not_linked: No paired motor on this frequency
createvoidway.ponder.gearcube.text_1: Relaying rotation in all directions can get bulky quickly
createvoidway.ponder.gearcube.text_2: A 6-Axis Gearcube is the more compact equivalent of this setup
createvoidway.ponder.lshaped_gearbox.hea: Relaying Rotational Force using L-Shaped Gearboxes
createvoidway.ponder.lshaped_gearbox.tex: Changing directions can get bulky quickly
A more compact alternative to this setup is using a Gearbox, but two shafts go unused
With an L-Shaped Gearbox you can make this in a cleaner and cheaper way
By Right-clicking it with a Wrench, you can change the orientation of the secondary axis
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_1: Void Motors can transmit Rotational Force across distances
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_2: Placing items in the two upper slots can specify a Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_3: Right-click the bottom slot to unclaim the Void Motor
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_4: Right-click it again to re-claim it
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_5: If a Void Motor is claimed, only it's owner is able to edit it's Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_motor.text_6: A Void Motor will only receive Rotational Force from Void Motors with the same Frequency and Owner
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_1: Void Chests can transmit Items across distances
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_2: Placing items in the two upper slots can specify a Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_3: Right-click the bottom slot to unclaim the Void Chest
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_4: Right-click it again to re-claim it
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_5: If a Void Chest is claimed, only it's owner is able to edit it's Frequency
createvoidway.ponder.void_chest.text_6: A Void Chest will only receive Items from Void Chests with the same Frequency and Owner

createvoidway.void_tank.no_stress_source: Shaft is not receiving sufficient stress
